name: 1,8-cineole
mechanism: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data and limited human use context: anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory effects associated with cineole-containing preparations.
contraindications: Retain caution for potential CYP-mediated interaction context rather than claiming a defined isolated-compound interaction profile.
summary: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data and limited human use context: anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory effects associated with cineole-containing preparations.
